scripts.build:chrome: vite build && npx esbuild src/content/contentScript.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/contentScript.js && cpy public/manifests/manifest.chrome.json dist/manifest.json
scripts.build:firefox: vite build && npx esbuild src/content/contentScript.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/contentScript.js && cpy public/manifests/manifest.firefox.json dist/manifest.json
